_comment: Doll (in-game: Collection Item; KR 소장품/'인형') super-success proc chance when upgrading one phase, by collectible rarity x toolbox tier. Source of truth: nikke.gg Collection Item guide image table, provided by the owner 2026-07-15 (DATAMINED tier). Values are PERCENT chance of a super success on that phase step (divide by 100 for probability). Rows indexed 0..14 where index i = upgrading phase i -> i+1 (index 0 = '0 to 1', index 14 = '14 to 15'). Toolbox tiers R/SR/SSR are the maintenance-kit tiers (community: Blue/Purple/Gold, ~200/500/1000 EXP — mapping INFERRED, confirm before relying). Collectibles come in R and SR rarity only (both cap at phase 15). NOTE: the exact effect of a super success (checkpoint jump vs bonus progress) and the normal-success EXP economy are NOT captured here — resolve when building the doll leveling optimizer (deliverable 2). This project currently models only the SR-phase-15 endpoint (docs/data/gear-doll.md).
